name: Basic Pasta Dough - Whole Wheat
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the whole wheat pastry flour, salt, olive oil, and water in a bowl.
2. Transfer the mixture to a mixer with bread hooks or a food processor.
3. Knead until the dough is smooth and well combined.
Note: You can add 1/4 of the flour with kamut, buckwheat, etc., for extra flavor. Chopped spinach, herbs, or tomato paste can also be added.
